page.title: API Keys
page.description: GateCtr SDK keys. One key per project. Shown once — store it securely.

security.note: Keys are hashed on creation. GateCtr never stores the raw value.

empty.title: No API keys yet
empty.description: Create your first key to start routing requests through GateCtr.

create.title: Create API key
create.name: Key name
create.nameDescription: A label to identify this key.

reveal.title: Save your API key
reveal.warning: This key will only be shown once. Copy it now.

card.confirmRevokeDescription: Any SDK or integration using this key will stop working immediately.
card.confirmDeleteDescription: This action is permanent. The key will be removed from your account.

errors.quota_exceeded: API key limit reached for your plan. Upgrade to create more.

success.created: Key created. Copy it now — it won't be shown again.
